data.title: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. ends EPFA and withdraws preliminary proxy statement, effective on October 24, 2025.
data.description: A technology company based in Midland, Texas, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: NUAI), specializing in digital infrastructure and power assets, has served notice to terminate its equity purchase facility agreement (EPFA). The termination is set for October 24, 2025. The decision comes as the Company believes it currently holds adequate capital and does not foresee the need for additional funding from the EPFA.

data.title: Kinaxis introduces Maestro Agents to enhance supply chain orchestration, aiding planners in decision-making.
data.description: Kinaxis Inc. revealed the launch of Maestro Agents, showcasing advancements in AI-driven decision intelligence for supply chains. This development, accessible to Kinaxis customers and integrated within Kinaxis Maestro®, introduces AI-infused digital assistants that are aware of the context. This new tool aids planners in swiftly transitioning from identifying problems to taking necessary actions, converting disruptions into advantageous scenarios, and enhancing the durability of the underlying supply chains. Maestro Agents are designed to help in accelerating responses to supply chain challenges, thus supporting efficiency and adaptability in the industry.

data.title: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. reports positive Q3 2025 results with $479.6M in System Sales, $71.2M Revenue, $23.6M Income before income taxes, $25.8M Adjusted EBITDA, and 1.4% Same Store Sales Growth. Total YTD 2025 Revenue $201.1M, Income before income taxes $53.3M, and Net income $39.3M. 3 new A&W restaurants opened.
data.description: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. reported positive financial results for Q3 2025, with a 1.4% Same Store Sales Growth and System Sales Growth of 3.1%, totaling $479.6 million. Total revenue for the quarter was $71.2 million, a decrease of 6%. Income before taxes increased by 163% to $23.6 million, and Adjusted EBITDA rose 5% to $25.8 million. Operating costs decreased by 31% to $31.8 million, with the opening of 3 new A&W restaurants during the quarter. Net income for Q3 2025 was $17.6 million. YTD 2025 showed positive growth in System Sales and Adjusted EBITDA, reflecting a successful year for A&W.

data.title: Ryan is ranked #1 in 2025 Best Places to Work in Baton Rouge by Baton Rouge Business Report.
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, Ryan, a prominent global provider of tax services and software, has achieved the top position on the 2025 Best Places to Work in Baton Rouge list by the Baton Rouge Business Report. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to cultivating exceptional workplace environments, prioritizing team member happiness, and making substantial investments in their workforce. Being named among the leading workplaces in the capital region is a great honor for Ryan as they continue to prioritize employee satisfaction and growth within the organization.

data.title: Cincoze launches new MAGNET product line for machine vision, focusing on high-performance DIN-Rail embedded computers. Expands product portfolio.
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, Cincoze, a leading brand in rugged edge computing, has introduced a new product line called MAGNET for Machine Computing. This series of DIN-Rail embedded computers marks Cincoze's fourth product line, in addition to their existing rugged embedded computers, industrial panel PCs, and GPU embedded computers. MAGNET is tailored for the Machine Level within smart manufacturing, offering high performance, modular scalability, and a compact design. This new product line aims to enhance Cincoze's product portfolio and meet the demands of the industry.

data.title: Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Techs offer tips for choosing home service providers. Based in Tacoma, WA.
data.description: One of the top companies in the Pacific Northwest, Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, emphasizes the importance of research and communication for homeowners to confidently choose qualified professionals. This Tacoma-based company reaffirms its commitment to providing exceptional home services in Western Washington. The news was released on October 17, 2025.

data.title: Jonathan Brudnick joins Six Flags Board of Directors.
data.description: A recent report indicated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, the lowest in the past decade. This improvement in the job market is reflected in the creation of over 250,000 new jobs last month alone. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has also increased to 62.7%, showing more people are actively seeking employment. These positive trends are contributing to a stronger economy and providing more opportunities for individuals to secure stable employment.

data.title: Crypto market sees $230B disappear overnight, fear index drops to 28, investor sentiment turns bearish.
data.description: The market sentiment among investors shifted dramatically to pessimistic as the fear index for cryptocurrencies dropped to 28. A staggering $230 billion in market value disappeared within a 24-hour period.

data.title: France is auditing Binance & other exchanges as part of EU power struggle. ACPR seeks to enforce MiCA rules.
data.description: The French regulatory authority, ACPR, is conducting audits on Binance and several other exchanges, as part of Paris' efforts to strengthen enforcement of MiCA regulations throughout Europe.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited to hold Q3 2025 conference call on Nov 6 at 8:30am ET, results out on Nov 5.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) revealed plans to conduct a conference call to review its third-quarter 2025 outcomes on November 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The event, featuring a live Internet broadcast and slide presentation, will disclose financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, on November 5, 2025, post-market trading hours.

data.title: TransUnion launches new mortgage credit offerings, aiming to provide competitive, affordable, and inclusive options for American families.
data.description: A revolutionary method has been introduced to develop a credit scoring system that is accessible, cost-effective, and accommodating for countless American households. This innovative approach aims to enhance competition within the sector, benefiting millions of families across the nation.

data.title: Laminated Glass Market projected to reach $54.50 billion by 2030. Key report findings summarized.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Laminated Glass Market was released. The report covers various glass types including Heat-strengthened, Tempered, Triple, Reflective, and others. It also analyzes the market based on different end-use industries like Automotive, Electronics, Building & Construction, Energy, and others across different regions globally. This comprehensive report provides insights and forecasts for the market trends, with key focus on industry segments and regional analysis.

data.title: Comerica's third quarter 2025 earnings released, details on website and Form 8-K filing.
data.description: Comerica Incorporated (NYSE: CMA) recently disclosed its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The report can be accessed on the Investor Relations page of Comerica's website. Furthermore, the detailed financial outcomes will be submitted through a Form 8-K filing.
